en: A soft answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
zh: 柔和的回答使烈怒消退， 暴戾的話激動怒氣。

en: The tongue of the wise commends knowledge, but the mouths of fools pour out folly.
zh: 智慧人的舌頭闡揚知識； 愚昧人的口發出愚妄。

en: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, keeping watch on the evil and the good.
zh: 耶和華的眼目無所不在； 壞人好人他都鑒察。

en: A gentle tongue is a tree of life, but perverseness in it breaks the spirit.
zh: 說安慰話的舌頭是生命樹； 奸惡的舌頭使人心碎。

en: A fool despises his father's instruction, but whoever heeds reproof is prudent.
zh: 愚妄人藐視父親的管教； 看重責備的是精明的人。

en: In the house of the righteous there is much treasure, but trouble befalls the income of the wicked.
zh: 義人家中財寶豐富； 惡人的收入卻帶來擾害。

en: The lips of the wise spread knowledge; not so the hearts of fools.
zh: 智慧人的嘴唇散播知識； 愚昧人的心並不是這樣。

en: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD, but the prayer of the upright is acceptable to him.
zh: 惡人的祭物是耶和華厭惡的； 正直人的禱告卻是他所喜悅的。

en: The way of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD, but he loves him who pursues righteousness.
zh: 惡人的道路是耶和華厭惡的； 追求公義的人卻是他所愛的。

en: There is severe discipline for him who forsakes the way; whoever hates reproof will die.
zh: 離棄正路的必受嚴厲的管教； 恨惡責備的必致死亡。

en: Sheol and Abaddon lie open before the LORD; how much more the hearts of the children of man!
zh: 陰間和滅亡展露在耶和華面前， 何況世人的心呢？

en: A scoffer does not like to be reproved; he will not go to the wise.
zh: 好譏笑人的不喜愛責備他的人， 也不到智慧人那裡去。

en: A glad heart makes a cheerful face, but by sorrow of heart the spirit is crushed.
zh: 喜樂的心使人臉上容光煥發； 心中愁苦使人精神頹喪。

en: The heart of him who has understanding seeks knowledge, but the mouths of fools feed on folly.
zh: 聰明人的心尋求知識， 愚昧人的口只吃愚妄。

en: All the days of the afflicted are evil, but the cheerful of heart has a continual feast.
zh: 困苦人的日子盡是艱難； 心中暢快的好像常享豐筵。

en: Better is a little with the fear of the LORD than great treasure and trouble with it.
zh: 財物雖少而敬畏耶和華， 勝過財物豐富卻煩惱不安。

en: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is than a fattened ox and hatred with it.
zh: 吃素菜而彼此相愛， 勝過吃肥牛卻彼此憎恨。

en: A hot-tempered man stirs up strife, but he who is slow to anger quiets contention.
zh: 脾氣暴烈的人常引起紛爭； 不輕易動怒的可平息爭執。

en: The way of a sluggard is like a hedge of thorns, but the path of the upright is a level highway.
zh: 懶惰人的道路好像荊棘籬笆； 正直人的路徑是平坦的大道。

en: A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish man despises his mother.
zh: 智慧的兒子使父親快樂； 愚昧人卻藐視自己的母親。

en: Folly is a joy to him who lacks sense, but a man of understanding walks straight ahead.
zh: 無知的人以愚妄為樂； 聰明人卻行事正直。

en: Without counsel plans fail, but with many advisers they succeed.
zh: 不經商議，計劃必定失敗； 謀士眾多，計劃就可成功。

en: To make an apt answer is a joy to a man, and a word in season, how good it is!
zh: 應對得當，自己也覺喜樂； 合時的話，多麼美好！

en: The path of life leads upward for the prudent, that he may turn away from Sheol beneath.
zh: 生命之路領明慧人向上， 因此他可以離開在下面的陰間。

en: The LORD tears down the house of the proud but maintains the widow's boundaries.
zh: 耶和華必拆毀驕傲人的家， 卻要立定寡婦的地界。

en: The thoughts of the wicked are an abomination to the LORD, but gracious words are pure.
zh: 邪惡的思想是耶和華厭惡的； 恩慈的話卻是純淨的。

en: Whoever is greedy for unjust gain troubles his own household, but he who hates bribes will live.
zh: 貪愛不義之財的禍害自己的家； 恨惡賄賂的必可以存活。

en: The heart of the righteous ponders how to answer, but the mouth of the wicked pours out evil things.
zh: 義人的心思想怎樣回答； 惡人的口發出惡言。

en: The LORD is far from the wicked, but he hears the prayer of the righteous.
zh: 耶和華遠離惡人， 卻垂聽義人的禱告。

en: The light of the eyes rejoices the heart, and good news refreshes the bones.
zh: 眼中的光采使人心快樂； 好消息使骨頭滋潤。

en: The ear that listens to life-giving reproof will dwell among the wise.
zh: 聽從有關生命之責備的， 必住在智慧人中間。

en: Whoever ignores instruction despises himself, but he who listens to reproof gains intelligence.
zh: 輕忽管教的是藐視自己； 聽從責備的卻得著智慧 。

en: The fear of the LORD is instruction in wisdom, and humility comes before honor.
zh: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的教訓； 尊榮以先，必有謙卑。
